name: App Header
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{ctaText}}
css: .header { padding: 1rem 0; background: transparent; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #fff; } .btn-primary { background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 1rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } }

name: App Hero
description: App hero with phone mockup and download buttons
html:
{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{#each buttons}}{{label}}{{name}}{{/each}}

{{stats}}
css: .hero { padding: 8rem 0 4rem; background: #0a0a0a; color: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .hero-content { max-width: 600px; text-align: center; margin: 0 auto; } .hero-title { font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .hero-title span { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #f472b6); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.25rem; color: #a3a3a3; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.6; } .download-buttons { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .store-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; background: #171717; border: 1px solid #333; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; color: #fff; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .store-btn:hover { border-color: #7c3aed; } .store-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #a3a3a3; } .store-name { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; } .hero-stats { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #a3a3a3; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero { padding: 6rem 0 3rem; } .hero-title { font-size: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } .download-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } }

subtitle.default: The all-in-one app that helps you organize, track, and achieve your goals. Available on iOS and Android.

name: App Features
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each features}}
{{icon}}

{{title}}

{{description}}

{{/each}}
css: .features { padding: 5rem 0; background: #171717; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .section-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #a3a3a3; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .feature-card { background: #0a0a0a; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid #262626; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .feature-card:hover { border-color: #7c3aed; } .feature-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .feature-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .feature-desc { color: #a3a3a3; line-height: 1.6; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .features-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: Powerful features designed to make your daily life easier

default.title: Lightning Fast
default.description: Optimized for speed. Every interaction feels instant.

default.title: Private by Default
default.description: End-to-end encryption. Your data stays yours.

default.title: Sync Everywhere
default.description: Seamless sync across all your devices in real-time.

default.title: Beautiful Design
default.description: Crafted with attention to every pixel and interaction.

default.title: AI-Powered
default.description: Smart suggestions that learn from your habits.

default.title: Dark Mode
default.description: Easy on the eyes with a gorgeous dark theme.

name: App Screenshots
html:
{{title}}

{{#each screenshots}}
{{title}}
{{/each}}
css: .screenshots { padding: 5rem 0; background: #0a0a0a; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; } .screenshots-grid { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; justify-content: center; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 1rem; } .screenshot-item { flex-shrink: 0; width: 220px; } .screenshot-image { aspect-ratio: 9/16; border-radius: 1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #262626; } .screenshot-placeholder { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } @media (max-width: 768px) { .screenshots-grid { gap: 1rem; } .screenshot-item { width: 160px; } }

name: App Testimonials
html:
{{title}}

{{#each testimonials}}
{{rating}}
"{{text}}"
{{name}}
{{/each}}
css: .testimonials { padding: 5rem 0; background: #171717; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; } .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .testimonial-card { background: #0a0a0a; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid #262626; } .testimonial-rating { color: #f59e0b; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .testimonial-text { color: #d4d4d4; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .author-name { color: #fff; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

default.text: This app completely changed how I organize my day. Absolutely love it!
default.name: Jessica M.

default.text: Clean, fast, and intuitive. The best productivity app I've ever used.
default.name: Ryan K.

default.text: The AI suggestions are scary accurate. It's like it reads my mind.

name: App CTA
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each buttons}}{{label}}{{name}}{{/each}}
css: .cta { padding: 5rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed 0%, #f472b6 100%); color: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .cta-content { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .cta-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .cta-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .store-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; color: #fff; transition: background 0.2s; } .store-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .store-label { font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.8; } .store-name { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .cta { padding: 3rem 0; } .cta-title { font-size: 2rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .cta-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } .cta-actions { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } }

description.default: Available for free on iOS and Android. Start organizing your life.

name: App Contact Form
html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}
{{#if type='textarea'}}{{else}}{{/if}}
{{/each}}
css: .contact-form { padding: 5rem 0; background: #0a0a0a; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; text-align: center; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-weight: 500; color: #a3a3a3; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: #171717; border: 1px solid #333; border-radius: 0.75rem; color: #fff; font-size: 1rem; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #7c3aed; } textarea.form-input { min-height: 100px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .btn-primary { background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; padding: 0.875rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; }

name: App Footer
html:
{{logo}}

{{description}}

    {{#each links}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}

{{copyright}}
css: .footer { padding: 3rem 0; background: #0a0a0a; border-top: 1px solid #262626; color: #737373; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .footer-inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .footer-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; max-width: 250px; line-height: 1.6; } .footer-nav { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 1.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .footer-nav a { color: #737373; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-nav a:hover { color: #7c3aed; } .footer-bottom { text-align: center; font-size: 0.75rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-inner { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; } .footer-nav { flex-wrap: wrap; } }

description.default: Your life, simplified. Available on iOS and Android.
